name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.7.0 split-script architecture, repository state doctor, conflict recovery UX, and quality-gate hardening
added: Split-script architecture that keeps each GUI implementation file below 4000 lines
Repository State Doctor for detached HEAD, divergence, recovery operations, unmerged files, and conflict markers
Conflict marker scanner for changed and unmerged files
GUI script validation updated for the split script set
Dynamic Changed Files context banner sizing
Static smoke test line-count guard to prevent another monolithic version file
next_recommended: v3.7.1: extract Repository State Doctor pure logic into a dedicated core module with Pester tests
v3.9: guided conflict resolution assistant and safer merge workflow automation
highlights: Restores clearer merge support that had become hidden or too current-branch dependent
Supports the real workflow: push feature upstream, merge selected feature into develop, run checks, merge develop into main
Keeps every merge/push action previewable and confirmation-based
iteration_highlights: Merge & Publish checklist preview for feature -> develop -> main
Merged feature branch cleanup command plans
Static release consistency checks for version drift
Updated README and repository workflow guidance
